cancelEntrant(Map<String, String>) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.InvitedFragment
Cancels an invited entrant by updating their status to "Cancelled" in Firestore.

Queries the Firestore "profiles" collection using the device's unique Android ID.

Clicks the Create Event button after scrolling to it.

Clicks the Save Changes button after scrolling to it.

createEvent(Event, Uri, EventRepository.RepositoryCallback<String>) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.repositories.EventRepository
Creates a new event in Firestore and optionally uploads a poster image (depending on if user uploads one).

Verifies that an error is shown when the address is empty.

Verifies that an error is shown when the description is empty.
createEvent_emptyDrawDate_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the draw date is empty.
createEvent_emptyEndDate_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the end date is empty.
createEvent_emptyFee_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the fee is empty.
createEvent_emptyName_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the event name is empty.
createEvent_emptyRegistrationEnd_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the registration end is empty.
createEvent_emptyRegistrationStart_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the registration start is empty.
createEvent_emptyStartDate_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the start date is empty.
createEvent_negativeCapacity_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when capacity is negative.
createEvent_negativeFee_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the fee is negative.
createEvent_negativeWaitlistLimit_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the waitlist limit is negative.
createEvent_nonNumericCapacity_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when capacity is not a whole number.
createEvent_nonNumericFee_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the fee is not numeric.
createEvent_nonNumericWaitlistLimit_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the waitlist limit is not a whole number.
createEvent_withoutPoster_savesEventSuccessfully() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.repositories.EventRepositoryTest
Verifies that createEvent assigns an ID, default waitlist count, default QR code content, and saves the event successfully when no poster image is provided.
createEvent_zeroCapacity_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when capacity is zero.
createEvent_zeroWaitlistLimit_showsError() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivityTest
Verifies that an error is shown when the waitlist limit is zero.
